homeViewDesc: Prepare Windows icon DLL libraries with a guided workflow: import assets, review previews, fix non-square images, and save a clean output.
homeViewCreateHint: Start from icon files or PNG images and build a ready-to-use DLL.
homeViewCreatePoint1: Import icons and review previews immediately.
homeViewCreatePoint2: Crop non-square images with a locked 1:1 selection.
homeViewCreatePoint3: Order resources and generate a clean DLL.
homeViewEditHint: Open an existing library, review extracted resources, and save an updated version.
homeViewEditPoint1: Load a DLL and inspect readable icons.
homeViewEditPoint2: Add, remove, crop, or reorder resources.
homeViewEditPoint3: Export a new DLL without overwriting the original.
itemViewCreateDesc: Add icons, check preview quality, and fix any non-square images before generation. The project stays blocked until every resource is valid.
itemViewEditDesc: Load an existing DLL, review extracted resources, and prepare an updated version with the right order, crop, and content. The original file is never overwritten.
dropZoneDesc: Drop ICO or PNG files here, or choose them from disk. Non-square images will be flagged and can be cropped.
previewEmpty: No icons added yet. Use the panel above to import files.

notifications.dllLoadWarnings: The DLL was loaded, but some icon resources could not be read.
notifications.noEditSource: Select the existing file to edit first.
notifications.noIcons: Add at least one ICO or PNG file before generating the DLL.
notifications.invalidIcons: There are {count} invalid files. Remove or replace them before saving.
notifications.createSavedBody: The DLL has been generated and saved.
notifications.editSavedBody: Your changes have been confirmed and saved to the DLL.
notifications.unsupportedFiles: Some files are not supported. Only ICO and PNG are accepted.
notifications.invalidEditSource: The selected file is not a valid DLL. Please load a .dll file.
notifications.notSquare: Icon is not square. Fix or remove it before building the DLL.

warnings.title: Load warnings
warnings.noIcons: No icon groups found in the DLL.

invalidIconsHint: Icons highlighted in red must be removed or cropped before saving.

search.label: Search icons by index
search.noResults: No icon found at that index.

crop.title: Crop icon
crop.hint: Select the square area to keep. The aspect ratio is locked to 1:1.

confirm.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now they will be lost.
confirm.resetMessage: All changes will be discarded and the icons will be re-read from the original file.
